PROMPT_TEMPLATE = "Context: {context}\nQuestion: {question}\nAnswer in {max_tokens} tokens."
BATCH_TEMPLATE = "Given the following context:\n{context}\n\nPlease answer: {question}\nBe concise."
MESSAGE_TEMPLATE = "User: {user}\nSystem: {system}\nTask: {task}"


def build_prompts(items):
    return [
        PROMPT_TEMPLATE.format(
            context=item["context"],
            question=item["question"],
            max_tokens=item["max_tokens"],
        )
        for item in items
    ]


def generate_batch(questions, context):
    return [
        BATCH_TEMPLATE.format(context=context, question=q)
        for q in questions
    ]


def format_messages(data):
    return [
        MESSAGE_TEMPLATE.format(user=e["user"], system=e["system"], task=e["task"])
        for e in data
    ]
